Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op
contains the operators of Terms.
org.key_project.logic
 

  • Uses of QuantifiableVariable in de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op

    Subinterfaces of QuantifiableVariable in de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    QuantifiableVariable
    This interface represents the variables that can be bound (by quantifiers or other binding operators).
    Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op that implement QuantifiableVariable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    LogicVariable
    The objects of this class represent logical variables, used e.g.
    final class 
    VariableSV
    Schema variable that is instantiated with logical variables.

  • Uses of QuantifiableVariable in org.key_project.logic

    Methods in org.key_project.logic that return types with arguments of type QuantifiableVariable
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ImmutableArray<? extends QuantifiableVariable>
    Term.boundVars()
    The logical variables bound by the top level operator.
    ImmutableSet<? extends QuantifiableVariable>
    Term.freeVars()
    The set of free quantifiable variables occurring in this term.
    ImmutableArray<? extends QuantifiableVariable>
    Term.varsBoundHere(int n)
    The logical variables bound by the top level operator for the nth subterm.
